properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I have searched to find the meaning of this life, Something that would fill my empty soul, Some believe a lie, choose darkness over light, But I will stand and let the whole world know.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I choose Jesus, I choose Jesus, The One who first chose me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I stand unashamed, trusting in one Name, 'Cause I have seen the cross and I believe, oh, This choice comes at a cost, all other things are lost, No other love could mean so much to me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I choose Jesus, I choose Jesus, The One who first chose me, I choose Jesus, I choose Jesus, For now and eternity.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: He chose to love me when I felt unlovable He chose to reach me when I felt unreachable He carried me out of my fear and doubt How I want the world to know I choose Jesus

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I choose Jesus, I choose Jesus, the One who first chose me I don't want anyone but You, my Jesus I choose Jesus, I choose Jesus For now and eternity, for now and eternity.
